_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Communication involves conveying information using the most effective medium and language for the audience.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to make defensible architectural decisions under uncertainty, documenting the rationale, rejected alternatives, and conditions that would trigger re-evaluation.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI DA domain. DA-A-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-S-001 (DG, cosine: 0.432), LS-S-010 (LS, cosine: 0.399).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 0.4/10 (raw 0.043). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DDaT-only terms [audience, communication, conveying, effective, information, involves] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, alternatives, architectural, conditions, decisions, defensible] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.850 (P=0.855, R=0.844). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DDaT element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (100.0%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Communication involves conveying information using the most effective medium and" and "Ability to make defensible architectural decisions under uncertainty, documentin". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.159 > STS 0.043 (gap +0.116). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.5%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DDaT terms: [audience, communication, conveying, effective, information, involves]. WIDAI terms: [ability, alternatives, architectural, conditions, decisions, defensible].
